speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Hobbies
questions: What do you do in your free time?
What kind of music do you listen to?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I usually read books and listen to music. Yes, I love to travel. I usually listen to pop music.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Review — Describe a typical day

cueCard.topic: Describe a typical day in your life.
bullets: what you do for work or school
what you do in your free time
and explain whether you enjoy your daily routine

speaking.sampleAnswer: I always wake up at six in the morning. I am a teacher, and I teach English in the afternoon. I rarely watch TV at night; I usually read books instead. I enjoy my daily routine because it is calm and useful.
